title: I Choose to Remain

segments.text: In the good times it is easy to praise.
But there’s sometimes when I have no words to say.
I just pray:
I choose to remain under Your dispensing.
Fill me with Your living Word today.
Supply me with grace, keep me in Your presence.
Let my life express You in this age.
He’s dispensing all He is into us.
When we’re open, His loving heart we can trust.
So just pray:
I choose to remain under Your dispensing.
Fill me with Your living Word today.
Supply me with grace, keep me in Your presence.
Let my life express You in this age.
We’ve been called and predestined to be His many sons.
Day by day we’re infused to be His expression.
So just pray:
I choose to remain under Your dispensing.
Fill me with Your living Word today.
Supply me with grace, keep me in Your presence.
Let my life express You in this age.
